Pratica L1/S2
1°
ip:  128.1.6.5/12
ip binario:           10000000.0000  0001.00000110.00000101
maschera:     => 11111111.1111  0000.00000000.00000000        => 255.240.0.0

network:        => 10000000.0000  0000.00000000.00000000     => 128.0.0.0
broadcast:     => 10000000.0000  1111.11111111.11111111     =>128.15.255.255

gateway1:    => 10000000.0000  0000.00000000.00000001      => 128.0.0.1
gateway2:    => 10000000.0000  1111.11111111.11111110.         => 128.15.255.254

numero massimo host o sottoreti:
2^(32 - cidr) - 2 = 1048574

network: 1,5 ottetti
host: 2,5 ottetti




2°
ip: 200.1.2.3/24        
ip binario:          11001000.00000001.00000010.  00000011
maschera:    => 11111111.11111111.11111111.  00000000   => 255.255.255.0

network:       => 11001000.00000001.00000010.  00000000    => 200.1.2.0
broadcast:   => 11001000.00000001.00000010.  11111111     => 200.1.2.255

gateway1:    => 11001000.00000001.00000010.  00000001     =>  200.1.2.1
gateway2:    => 11001000.00000001.00000010.  11111110     => 200.1.2.254

numero massimo host o sottoreti:
2^(32 - cidr) - 2 = 254

network: 3 ottetti
host: 1 ottetto

ip binario: 11000000. 11000000.000000  01.00000001
maschera:    => 11111111.11111111.111111  00.00000000
=>255.255.252.0

=> 192.192.0.0
broadcast:   => 11000000. 11000000.000000  11.11111111
=>192.192.3.255
gateway1:    => 11000000. 11000000.000000  00.00000001
=> 192.192.0.1
gateway2:    => 11000000. 11000000.000000  11.11111110
=> 192.192.3.254

numero massimo host o sottoreti:

host: 1,25 ottetto



4°

ip binario: 01111110.0  0000101.00000100.00000011

=> 255.128.0.0

=>126.0.0.0

=>126.127.255.255

gateway1:    => 01111110.0 0000000.00000000.00000001
=> 126.0.0.1
gateway2:    => 01111110.0 1111111.11111111.11111110
=>126.127.255.254

6°
ip: 172.16.0.4/16       
ip binario: 10101100. 00010000. 00000000.00000100
maschera:    => 11111111.11111111. 00000000.00000000
=>255.255.0.0

network:     => 10101100. 00010000. 00000000.00000000
=>172.16.0.0
broadcast:   => 10101100. 00010000. 11111111.11111111
=>172.16.255.255


gateway1:    => 10101100. 00010000. 00000000.00000001
=>172.16.0.1
gateway2:    =>10101100. 00010000. 11111111.11111110
=>172.16.255.254

host: 2 ottetti
